champion.description: Full-covariance moment propagation, exact per-neuron post-ReLU mean/variance, gain-product (Phi_i*Phi_j) off-diagonal approximation, overflow rescaling.
champion.note: Score null until B0 baselines it on datasets/depth32-dev. Do not promote or submit before B0.
